div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #333; max-width: 600px; line-height: 1.5;
div.p: The email you sent to couldn't be processed. This mailbox is monitored by our automated system and doesn't accept direct messages.

t.p:
If you'd like to get in touch with us, please use our contact form:
https://www.igebc.co/#contact-us

If you'd like to apply for an open position, please visit our jobs page:
https://www.igebc.co/jobs

If you'd like to get in touch with us, please use our contact form:
https://www.bicc.ph/#contact-us

If you'd like to apply for an open position, please visit our jobs page:
https://www.bicc.ph/jobs
